test:frontend.error: Test files import from 'vitest' but project uses Jest. auth.test.ts imports vi from vitest, dashboard.test.tsx and onboarding.test.tsx use vi from 'jest' (vi doesn't exist in Jest - should be jest.fn()). Also TypeScript type annotations in mocks cause parse errors.

test:backend.error: DATABASE_URL not set. When set to sqlite, database.py passes pool_size/max_overflow args that SQLite doesn't support. This is a pre-existing test configuration issue.

blockingIssues.description: Go and Python files coexist in apps/api/internal/ - orphaned Go files (google.go, service.go, session.go, config.go, httpapi/server.go) in Python FastAPI project
Orphaned go.mod exists in Python FastAPI project - implies Go backend that doesn't exist
Both Vite (vite.config.ts, main.tsx) and Next.js (next.config.js, app/page.tsx) configurations exist causing confusion about build system

Logout endpoint returns plain JSON {"message": "Logged out successfully"} but frontend logout() uses readEnvelope<T>() expecting {"success": true, "data": {...}, "error": null}. All logout attempts fail even on success.
Missing GET /admin/users endpoint - frontend adminApi.listUsers() calls this but it is not implemented
Missing GET /admin/users/{user_id} endpoint - frontend adminApi.getUser() calls this but it is not implemented
Fitness baseline (Step 5) has no validation before completing onboarding. Required fields should gate dashboard access but gender and fitnessLevel can be left empty.
onboarding_complete flag set prematurely on every step save, not just when fully complete. Users who skip steps would have onboarding_complete=true
Diagnostic quiz calculates level locally instead of calling submitAssessment() API. Quiz answers not persisted to backend.
Bookmark model lacks database-level unique constraint on (user_id, lesson_id). Concurrent requests could create duplicate bookmarks despite service-layer checks.
LessonProgress model lacks database-level unique constraint on (user_id, lesson_id). Concurrent requests could create duplicate progress records.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the API response envelope convention: when should endpoints return {"success": true, "data": {...}, "error": null} vs direct response format? The inconsistency between auth-google-oauth logout and other endpoints caused a blocking bug.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: auth-google-oauth review found logout() uses readEnvelope but fetchCurrentUser() and signInWithGoogle() don't. No documentation exists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary rule: when switching implementation languages (e.g., Go to Python) mid-project, all orphaned files from the previous approach must be cleaned up before committing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: project-scaffold review found Go files orphaned in Python FastAPI project. No rule existed for cleanup.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that admin tokens should follow same httpOnly cookie convention as user JWT tokens, or explicitly document why localStorage is acceptable for admin.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: basic-admin-panel stores admin token in localStorage contrary to AGENTS.md 'JWT tokens in httpOnly cookies (not localStorage)' guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether TDD is strictly enforced. Frontend-worker skill says 'Write tests first' but student-dashboard and student-onboarding created tests after implementation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: student-dashboard skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true but transcript shows tests were added after implementation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add test:api command that sets DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory: and runs pytest with proper SQLite configuration (no pool args).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Backend tests fail because database.py passes pool_size/max_overflow to create_async_engine which SQLite doesn't support.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add dev:setup command that runs docker compose up -d postgres redis and pip install in one step.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: auth-email-otp review found workers had to discover setup steps individually.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Create architecture.md documenting: (1) API response envelope convention, (2) ID type convention (UUID vs str), (3) Database unique constraint patterns for user-specific records, (4) Module organization
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews noted missing architecture.md causing inconsistencies (ID types, envelope format, unique constraints).

rejectedObservations.reason: Not actionable for this milestone - skill availability is an infrastructure concern

testConfigurationIssues.frontend: Test files use vitest imports but project uses Jest. auth.test.ts imports from 'vitest', dashboard.test.tsx/onboarding.test.tsx use 'vi' from 'jest' (should be jest.fn()). TypeScript type annotations in mock functions cause parse errors. This is a pre-existing configuration issue not introduced by any single feature.
testConfigurationIssues.backend: Test infrastructure requires DATABASE_URL but database.py doesn't handle SQLite properly (passes pool args). No jest.config.js for frontend tests. Pre-existing configuration issue.
